instruction: Please configure the VyOS router according to the provided YAML specification.
input:
metadata:
  device: leaf2
  role: leaf
underlay:
  bgp_asn: 65602
  router_id: 10.200.0.12
  spines:
  - name: spine1
    neighbor_ip: 172.20.2.1
    remote_asn: 65500
  - name: spine2
    neighbor_ip: 172.20.2.2
    remote_asn: 65500
  - name: spine3
    neighbor_ip: 172.20.2.3
    remote_asn: 65500
  - name: spine4
    neighbor_ip: 172.20.2.4
    remote_asn: 65500
overlay:
  vnis:
  - id: 20000
    vlan: 10
    vrf: TENANT_1
    gateway: 172.250.50.1/24
    description: Segment for Tenant 1
output:
set system host-name 'leaf2'
set protocols bgp system-as '65602'
set protocols bgp parameters router-id '10.200.0.12'
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.20.2.1 remote-as '65500'
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.20.2.1 address-family l2vpn evpn
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.20.2.2 remote-as '65500'
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.20.2.2 address-family l2vpn evpn
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.20.2.3 remote-as '65500'
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.20.2.3 address-family l2vpn evpn
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.20.2.4 remote-as '65500'
set protocols bgp neighbor 172.20.2.4 address-family l2vpn evpn
set interfaces vxlan vxlan0 source-address 'lo'
set protocols bgp address-family l2vpn evpn advertise-all-vni
set interfaces vxlan vxlan0 vni 20000
set interfaces bridge br10 member interface vxlan0 vni 20000
set interfaces bridge br10 address '172.250.50.1/24'
set protocols bgp address-family l2vpn evpn vni 20000 advertise-svi-ip
